svg.title: OpenWeatherMap extraction detail
svg.desc: Shows the Python extractor calling the /current and /forecast endpoints, the key fields returned, and how they land partitioned in the data lake.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write me a Python function to call the OpenWeatherMap current weather API')
sendPrompt('What fields does the OpenWeatherMap current weather endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the OpenWeatherMap 5-day forecast endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('How should I save the raw API response before transforming it?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure S3 partitions for weather data?')
sendPrompt('How should I store forecast data partitions differently from current?')
sendPrompt('What are the most important fields to extract from OpenWeatherMap for a data engineering project?')
g.text: Key fields to track per city
